englishDefinitions: Organize and arrange this reunion, often carefully and sometimes for a show or planned effect.
persianTranslation: این دیدار مجدد را ترتیب دادن
این گردهمایی را برنامه‌ریزی و اجرا کردن
examples: The team staged this reunion to celebrate their anniversary.
She helped stage this reunion between old classmates.
It took weeks to stage this reunion properly.
